text:
Created attachment 168371
New (a.k.a. working) patch to update VictorOps from 1.1.8 to 1.4.20

Sorry, I completely munged the first patch for this. Left old patches in the files directory. Among other problems. Sorry about this.

This leaves a few 0 byte patch- files, which need to be deleted.

Again, sorry for the hassle.
